Hemdal
FeaturesUse CasesSecurityDownload
Sign InDownload
v0.1.0 is now available with biometric unlock

Your secrets, encrypted, always yours.

Hemdal is a secure, cross-platform password and secret manager with end-to-end encryption, biometric unlock, browser autofill, and P2P sync. No cloud required.

Download for WindowsView on GitHub
AES-256-GCM Encryption
Argon2id Key Derivation
Zero-Knowledge

Everything you need to stay secure

Hemdal packs enterprise-grade security into a simple, beautiful desktop app.

End-to-End Encryption

All vault items are encrypted with AES-256-GCM. Your master password is never stored.

Biometric Unlock

Unlock your vault instantly with Windows Hello. Touch ID and Face ID support coming soon.

Browser Autofill

Chrome and Firefox extension detects login forms and fills credentials automatically.

TOTP / 2FA Codes

Generate 6-digit 2FA codes from stored TOTP secrets with a live 30-second countdown.

Fuzzy Search

Find any item in milliseconds with fast substring scoring search across your entire vault.

Breach Check

Check your passwords against the Have I Been Pwned database via k-Anonymity API.

Import & Export

Import from Bitwarden, 1Password, and CSV. Export to encrypted JSON or CSV anytime.

Password Generator

Built-in generator with configurable length, symbols, and a real-time strength meter.

System Tray & Auto-Lock

Minimize to tray, lock from the tray menu, and auto-lock after 10 minutes of inactivity.

P2P Sync Ready

Synchronize your vault across devices on your local network without any cloud server.

Built for how you work

Whether you are a developer, a team, or just someone who values privacy, Hemdal fits your workflow.

Developers

Store API keys, environment variables, SSH keys, and database credentials securely. Never commit secrets to Git again.

  • API Keys & Tokens
  • Environment Variables
  • SSH Keys
  • Database URLs

Personal Use

Manage all your personal passwords, secure notes, and credit cards in one encrypted vault that only you can unlock.

  • Passwords & Logins
  • Secure Notes
  • Credit Cards
  • 2FA Secrets

Teams

Share credentials without sharing plaintext. P2P sync keeps team secrets on your local network, not in the cloud.

  • Shared Credentials
  • P2P Sync
  • No Cloud Required
  • Audit Trail Ready

Freelancers

Juggling multiple client accounts? Organize credentials by project with tags, favorites, and fast fuzzy search.

  • Project Organization
  • Tags & Favorites
  • Fast Search
  • Client Separation

Security by design

We built Hemdal with a zero-trust architecture. Every layer is hardened so your secrets stay yours.

Step 01

Master Password

You create a strong master password. It is never stored anywhere. Not on disk, not in memory for long, and never sent to any server.

Step 02

Argon2id Derivation

Your master password is hashed with Argon2id, the winner of the Password Hashing Competition. This produces a cryptographically strong master key.

Step 03

Vault Key Encryption

A random 256-bit vault key encrypts all your items. That vault key itself is encrypted by your master key using AES-256-GCM.

Step 04

Secure Memory

All keys use secure memory containers that are automatically zeroed from RAM when no longer needed. Keys never swap to disk.

Encryption Flow

Master Password
→↓
Argon2id
→↓
Master Key
→↓
AES-256-GCM
→↓
Vault Items

Get Hemdal

Available for Windows today. macOS and Linux builds coming soon. The browser extension works on Chrome and Firefox.

Windows

MSI installer or NSIS setup executable

Download Latest

Build from Source

Clone the repo and build with Tauri + Cargo

View Instructions

Browser Extension

Load unpacked from apps/extension/dist

View Instructions
Quick Start
# Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/zanni098/hemdal.git
cd hemdal

# Install dependencies
pnpm install

# Build the desktop app
cd apps/desktop && pnpm tauri:build

# Build the browser extension
cd apps/extension && pnpm build

Stay in the loop

Get notified about new releases, security updates, and features. No spam, ever.

Hemdal

Secure, cross-platform password and secret manager with end-to-end encryption and P2P sync.
